creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
How to reproduce:

1. Attach USB pendrive to Your computer.
2. Create ZFS pool 'REMOTE' on that USB attached pendrive.
3. Physically detach that pendrive from Your Computer.
4. Issue ZPOOL EXPORT REMOTE command.

Command ZPOOL EXPORT REMOTE will be hanged till reboot.

Regards,
vermaden
